nasb.text: and immediately he began to proclaim Jesus in the synagogues, saying, “He is the Son of God.”

esv.text: And immediately he proclaimed Jesus in the synagogues, saying, “He is the Son of God.”

cnv.text: 隨即在各會堂傳講耶穌，說他是　神的兒子。

ccb.text: 便到各会堂去宣讲：“耶稣是上帝的儿子。”

csbs.text: 就立刻在各会堂里传讲耶稣，说这一位就是神的儿子。
